headline: Here’s Why Stifel Reiterated a Buy Rating on Waste Management Inc (WM) Stock
summary: Waste Management Inc (NYSE:WM) is one of the best long-term stocks to invest in according to Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation Trust. On June 12, Stifel reiterated a Buy rating on Waste Management Inc (NYSE:WM) stock with a price target of $252. The brokerage made this call after hosting Waste Management’s COO Tara Hemmer at […]

headline: Got $1,500? 1 Core Portfolio Cornerstone With an Unshakable Economic Moat to Buy on the Dip
summary: Waste Management (NYSE:WM) is often discussed as a long-duration retirement holding for the next two or three decades because it is the closest thing the public markets offer to a regulated economic utility with private-sector pricing power. The forever case rests on three pillars: a network that cannot be rebuilt, an income stream that compounds ... Got $1,500? 1 Core Portfolio Cornerstone With an Unshakable Economic Moat to Buy on the Dip
